title: As It Was
why_this_song: As It Was by Harry Styles (2022) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "In this world, it's just us"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "You know it's not the same as it was"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You know it's not the same as it was"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "In this world, it's just us"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Why don't we leave it at that?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: In this world, it's just us

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "As It Was" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "As It Was"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Harry Styles one question about "As It Was", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Harry Styles sobre "As It Was", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "As It Was" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "As It Was" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
